_comment: Seed baseline pending first Linux-CI recording. macOS dev boxes cannot generate a real mutation score because mutmut 3.5.0 uses os.fork() after loading native extensions (DuckDB, pyarrow), which segfaults on the Apple Objective-C runtime — see ADR 0026's 'local-recording limitation on macOS' negative-consequence note. To land the first real baseline, dispatch the `.github/workflows/mutation.yml` workflow with `record-baseline=true`, download the `mutation-baseline` artefact, and commit the replacement file.
